verdict.answer_first: A: "Short answer: use an ORM/query-builder" gives the actionable answer immediately; B opens broader with "default to a typed query layer".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits closer to one prescription: "ORM for 90% of routes, raw SQL...10%"; B explicitly splits into "Prisma," "Drizzle or Kysely," and "Raw SQL".
verdict.fabrication: A has unsupported precision: "90% of routes" and "10% of hot/complex queries"; B has unsupported generalization: "most new APIs want".
verdict.actionability: A is easier to execute because it gives a default rule plus exception: "Default to Prisma (or Drizzle)" and "reach for raw SQL surgically".
